params.name: Cassegrain Antenna
params.description:
On Aug 27, 1977 AD, Voyager 1 was launched into space carrying a Cassegrain Antenna.
It is a commonly used antenna in microwave communication, consisting of three parts: a reflector, a sub-reflector, and a radiation source. The reflector is a rotating parabolic surface, and the sub-reflector is a rotating hyperbolic surface. One focus of the hyperbola coincides with one focus of the parabola, and the radiation source is located at the other focus of the hyperbola. After the sub-reflector refl …
